core_mechanism: successive symmetry breaking via branching rules — decomposing an irreducible representation of an algebra into irreducibles of a chain of subalgebras, so that the resulting multiplet sizes reproduce an observed degeneracy pattern
brief_reason: The abstract explains a degeneracy structure by constructing branching schemes that decompose a 64-dimensional irreducible representation of a Lie superalgebra (osp(5|2)) through a chain of subalgebra reductions with a stepwise symmetry-breaking pattern.
